title: 🌟[FUN AND PROGRESSIVE]🌟SALES CREW
description:
WANT TO EMBRACE THE NEW YOU?

We are here looking out for you, so let us know if this interests you.

Join us for a high-energy team where you’ll learn real skills, meet amazing people, and build a resume that actually stands out. 🚀

What You’ll Be Doing ✍🏻:

- Assist with events, roadshows & brand campaigns

- Learn face-to-face marketing & customer engagement

- Support the team in sales activities

- Find and attract new potential customers

- Work with fun and vibrant people

With what you'll be doing, you get the following:

- Attractive income 💰: The better performer you are, the higher the potential earnings that you can make. Your write your own paycheck.

- Travelling opportunities 🧳: Subjected to performance, you could be selected to our regional offices for learning and development. You just have to pack your luggage and flash your passport!

- On-going coaching provided 👨🏻‍🎓👩🏻‍🎓: The skills are portable. The skills you gained over time can be adapted into any markets. Be it business or personal.

- 👯‍♀️ Work with your friends : Bring your crew along.

However, to start this journey, we will need the following from you:

- Energetic, outgoing, and willing to learn

- Can commit full-time

- Good communication

- Able to perform in team and individually

- Eager to embrace challenges and work collaboratively within a team

Join us now🤩

postedCompany.description:
At AxisReach Recruitment Organisation, we’re not just another sales and marketing company — we’re a growing team of passionate people who believe in creating real connections and delivering real results.

We work closely with some of the biggest names in the service industry, helping them reach their audience through a face-to-face marketing approach that’s proven, personal, and effective. By being on the ground and truly engaging with people, we build stronger brand reputations and long-lasting customer relationships.

What drives us is simple: passion, commitment, and the belief that great products and services deserve to be seen, experienced, and appreciated. Whether it’s working with businesses, professionals, or everyday consumers, we bring energy and integrity to everything we do.

Our team is what makes AxisReach stand out. We’re a diverse, motivated group with shared values and a common goal — to grow together, support one another, and go above and beyond for our clients
postedCompany.name: AXISREACH RECRUITMENT

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
